title: AuditEvent: exception_station
description: Emitted by ROUTE_FOR_REVIEW handler and 3 legacy manual review handlers in nodes.py. Signals that an invoice was routed to an exception station.

node.description: Node ID or canonical_key of the exception station.

reason.description: Why the invoice was routed to an exception station.

gateway.description: Node ID of the last gateway before exception routing, or '?' if unknown.
